trending_tools.name: vibecode-pro-max-kit
trending_tools.description: Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 12 agents, 32 skills. Kills context rot, ships features, not spaghetti. Claude Code & Codex. Any stack. 30 seconds

trending_tools.name: adhd
trending_tools.description: ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Claude & Codex Agent SDK. Fans out parallel divergent thoughts under different cognitive frames, scores, prunes traps, deepens the survivors. The no-brainer skill for creative and interdisciplinary work.

trending_tools.name: ShardBrowser
trending_tools.description: Free, open-source anti-detect browser launcher for web scraping and multi-accounting. By the ProxyShard team. Engine-level fingerprint spoofing in Chromium 148 (WebGL / WebGPU / Client Hints / fonts / TLS), 170+ device profiles bundled, stable QUIC + WebRTC over SOCKS5.

trending_tools.name: gbase

trending_tools.name: pmb
trending_tools.description: Local-first persistent memory for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) via MCP. 94.5% LoCoMo recall@10, 70ms p50, multilingual, zero API keys.

trending_tools.name: simulacra
trending_tools.description: Ghost personas review your code before it ships. Find edge cases, race conditions, and business logic bugs before production.
